Mark up a real historical stock chart with trendlines and levels, predict up or down, then watch what actually happened — and get caught the moment you start trading on tilt.

  • Draw your read — trendlines, levels and fibs, then see if they held.
  • Daily & weekly views — switch timeframe and read the structure on both.
  • A nudge when you're rushing — speed up after a loss and it calls your tilt.
